evals.prompt: Write a Python function using pandas to read 'sales.csv', group by 'region', compute mean of 'revenue', and sort descending.
evals.expected_output: Claude must look up pandas docs via Context7 (read_csv, groupby, agg/mean, sort_values) before writing any code, then produce correct argument names.

evals.prompt: Use method `UserRepository.get_by_email(email)` from `app/repositories/user_repo.py` to fetch a user and update their `last_login` field to the current timestamp.
evals.expected_output: Claude must grep for UserRepository in app/repositories/user_repo.py first. If not found, stop and ask the user — never guess the signature.

evals.prompt: Write a FastAPI POST /items endpoint accepting a Pydantic model with fields: name (str), price (float), in_stock (bool), then save it to a SQLAlchemy model named Item.
evals.expected_output: Claude must look up FastAPI, Pydantic, and SQLAlchemy via Context7 — all three — before writing any code.
